tools.name: search_tee_times
tools.description: Search live, bookable golf tee times at courses near a US location. Returns courses ranked by distance, price, or soonest time, each with availability counts, lowest price, sample tee times, a book_url (the LoopGolf booking page for that course and date), and a course_slug for get_course_tee_times.

tools.name: get_course_tee_times
tools.description: List every bookable tee time at one golf course for a date, plus a book_url (the LoopGolf booking page for the course and date) and an availability-by-date summary for the course's whole booking window. Requires the course_slug returned by search_tee_times. Use when the golfer has picked a course or
